model.description: The model name. See documentation for possible values.

temperature.description: Temperature controls the amount of randomness used in response generation. A higher temperature corresponds to more randomness.

top_p.description: Threshold probability for nucleus sampling. A higher top-p value increases the diversity of tokens that the model considers, while a lower value results in more predictable output.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of output tokens to produce. The default value is model-dependent.

max_output_tokens.description: Deprecated in favor of "max_tokens", which has identical behavior.

response_format.description: An object describing response format config for structured-output mode.

tools.description: List of tools to be used during tool calling

provisioned_throughput_id.description: The provisioned throughput ID to be used with the request.
